summary: Investigated why overlay mode isn't showing when enabled in Usage Tracker. Root cause identified: the recreateWindow function doesn't exist and registerIpcHandlers is called without required parameters (getWindow, recreateWindowFn). The set-overlay-mode IPC handler closes the window but has no way to recreate it with overlay-specific configuration (200x200, transparent, always-on-top, frameless).
current_status: Root cause identified - missing implementation for window recreation with overlay mode configuration
next_steps: Implement recreateWindow function in src/main/index.ts that creates overlay-specific window configuration
Update registerIpcHandlers call to pass getWindow and recreateWindow parameters
Add CSS for UsageOverlay component to enforce 200x200 size
Implement window positioning logic for overlay corner placement
